name: AdvancedJump3D
previewIconUrl: https://resources.gdevelop-app.com/assets/Icons/Line Hero Pack/Master/SVG/Sports and Fitness/Sports and Fitness_training_running_run.svg
shortDescription: 3D character air jump and coyote time (ledge tolerance) behavior.

eventsBasedBehaviors.description: Let 3D physics characters jump shortly after leaving a platform and also jump in mid-air.
eventsBasedBehaviors.fullName: Coyote time and air jump for 3D
eventsBasedBehaviors.name: AdvancedJump3D

eventsFunctions.name: SetCoyoteTime
eventsFunctions.description: Change the coyote time duration of an object (in seconds).

eventsFunctions.name: CanCoyoteJump
eventsFunctions.description: Check if a coyote jump can currently happen.

eventsFunctions.name: AirJumpsMax
eventsFunctions.description: Number of jumps in mid-air that are allowed.

eventsFunctions.name: SetAirJumpCountMaximum
eventsFunctions.description: Change the number of times the character can jump in mid-air.

eventsFunctions.name: RemainingAirJumps
eventsFunctions.description: Number of jumps in mid-air that are still allowed.

eventsFunctions.name: RemoveOneRemainingAirJump
eventsFunctions.description: Remove one of the remaining air jumps of a character.

eventsFunctions.name: ResetAirJumpCounter
eventsFunctions.description: Allow back all air jumps of a character.

eventsFunctions.name: AreFloorJumpCountedAsAirJump
eventsFunctions.fullName: Floor jumps count as air jumps
eventsFunctions.description: Check if floor jumps are counted as air jumps for an object.

description:
This extension provides behaviors to:

* Jump in mid-air
* Do coyote time, also known as "ledge tolerance". It lets players jumping even after their character is no longer touching the ground for a given amount of time. It aims to give players a feeling of control and reduce frustration.
